properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles
properties.description: Role configurations for the Open Agent Auth framework. Each role composes capabilities to create specific functional roles (e.g., authorization-server, agent, agent-idp, agent-user-idp, as-user-idp).

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.[role-name]
properties.description: Configuration for a specific role instance.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.[role-name].enabled
properties.description: Whether this role is enabled.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.[role-name].instance-id
properties.description: Instance identifier for this role (supports multiple instances).

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.[role-name].issuer
properties.description: Issuer URL for this role instance.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.[role-name].config
properties.description: Role-specific configuration overrides.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent.enabled
properties.description: Whether the agent role is enabled.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent.instance-id
properties.description: Instance identifier for the agent role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent.issuer
properties.description: Issuer URL for the agent role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent.capabilities
properties.description: List of capabilities used by the agent role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.authorization-server.enabled
properties.description: Whether the authorization-server role is enabled.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.authorization-server.instance-id
properties.description: Instance identifier for the authorization-server role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.authorization-server.issuer
properties.description: Issuer URL for the authorization-server role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.authorization-server.capabilities
properties.description: List of capabilities used by the authorization-server role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent-idp.enabled
properties.description: Whether the agent-idp role is enabled.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent-idp.instance-id
properties.description: Instance identifier for the agent-idp role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent-idp.issuer
properties.description: Issuer URL for the agent-idp role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent-idp.capabilities
properties.description: List of capabilities used by the agent-idp role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent-user-idp.enabled
properties.description: Whether the agent-user-idp role is enabled.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent-user-idp.instance-id
properties.description: Instance identifier for the agent-user-idp role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent-user-idp.issuer
properties.description: Issuer URL for the agent-user-idp role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.agent-user-idp.capabilities
properties.description: List of capabilities used by the agent-user-idp role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.as-user-idp.enabled
properties.description: Whether the as-user-idp role is enabled.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.as-user-idp.instance-id
properties.description: Instance identifier for the as-user-idp role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.as-user-idp.issuer
properties.description: Issuer URL for the as-user-idp role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.roles.as-user-idp.capabilities
properties.description: List of capabilities used by the as-user-idp role.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities
properties.description: Capabilities configuration properties. This class defines capability-level configurations that can be composed by roles.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server
properties.description: OAuth 2.0 Server capability configuration. Provides OAuth 2.0 authorization server functionality including authorization flows, token issuance, and client management.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.enabled
properties.description: Whether the OAuth 2.0 Server capability is enabled.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.endpoints
properties.description: OAuth 2.0 endpoints configuration. Defines the REST API endpoints for the OAuth 2.0 authorization server.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.endpoints.authorize
properties.description: Authorization endpoint path. The endpoint where the authorization server redirects the user for authentication and consent.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.endpoints.token
properties.description: Token endpoint path. The endpoint where clients exchange authorization codes, refresh tokens, or client credentials for access tokens.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.endpoints.par
properties.description: PAR (Pushed Authorization Request) endpoint path. The endpoint where clients can push authorization request parameters to receive a request URI.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.endpoints.userinfo
properties.description: Userinfo endpoint path. The endpoint where clients can retrieve user profile information using an access token.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.endpoints.dcr
properties.description: DCR (Dynamic Client Registration) endpoint path. The endpoint where clients can dynamically register themselves with the authorization server.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.endpoints.logout
properties.description: Logout endpoint path. The endpoint where users can log out and invalidate their session.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.token
properties.description: OAuth 2.0 token configuration. Defines the expiry times for various OAuth 2.0 token types.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.token.access-token-expiry
properties.description: Access token expiry in seconds. The lifetime of access tokens issued by the authorization server.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.token.refresh-token-expiry
properties.description: Refresh token expiry in seconds. The lifetime of refresh tokens issued by the authorization server.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.token.id-token-expiry
properties.description: ID token expiry in seconds. The lifetime of ID tokens issued by the authorization server.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.token.authorization-code-expiry
properties.description: Authorization code expiry in seconds. The lifetime of authorization codes issued by the authorization server.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients
properties.description: Auto-register clients configuration. Defines the list of OAuth 2.0 clients that should be automatically registered with the authorization server at startup.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.enabled
properties.description: Whether auto-register clients is enabled. When enabled, the authorization server will automatically register the clients defined in the clients list at startup.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.clients
properties.description: Client configurations. A list of OAuth 2.0 client configurations to be automatically registered.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.clients.[].client-name
properties.description: Client name. A human-readable name for the OAuth 2.0 client.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.clients.[].client-id
properties.description: Client ID. The unique identifier for the OAuth 2.0 client.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.clients.[].client-secret
properties.description: Client secret. The secret used to authenticate the client with the authorization server.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.clients.[].redirect-uris
properties.description: Redirect URIs. A list of URIs where the authorization server will redirect the user after successful authorization.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.clients.[].grant-types
properties.description: Grant types. A list of OAuth 2.0 grant types that the client is allowed to use.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.clients.[].response-types
properties.description: Response types. A list of OAuth 2.0 response types that the client is allowed to use.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.clients.[].token-endpoint-auth-method
properties.description: Token endpoint authentication method. The method used to authenticate the client at the token endpoint.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-server.auto-register-clients.clients.[].scopes
properties.description: Scopes. A list of OAuth 2.0 scopes that the client is allowed to request.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client
properties.description: OAuth 2.0 Client capability configuration. Provides OAuth 2.0 client functionality for authenticating users and obtaining tokens from authorization servers.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.enabled
properties.description: Whether the OAuth 2.0 Client capability is enabled.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.authentication
properties.description: Authentication configuration for protecting endpoints. Defines which endpoints require OAuth 2.0 authentication and how paths are included or excluded from authentication.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.authentication.enabled
properties.description: Whether authentication is enabled. When enabled, requests to included paths will require valid OAuth 2.0 tokens.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.authentication.include-paths
properties.description: Include paths for authentication. A list of path patterns that require OAuth 2.0 authentication.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.authentication.exclude-paths
properties.description: Exclude paths from authentication. A list of path patterns that should be excluded from OAuth 2.0 authentication.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.callback
properties.description: Callback configuration for OAuth 2.0 authorization flow. Defines the callback endpoint and credentials for handling OAuth 2.0 authorization code responses.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.callback.enabled
properties.description: Whether callback is enabled. When enabled, the application will expose a callback endpoint to receive OAuth 2.0 authorization code responses.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.callback.endpoint
properties.description: Callback endpoint path. The endpoint path where the authorization server will redirect the user after authorization with the authorization code.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.callback.client-id
properties.description: Client ID for token exchange. The OAuth 2.0 client identifier used to exchange the authorization code for an access token.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.callback.client-secret
properties.description: Client secret for token exchange. The OAuth 2.0 client secret used to authenticate the client when exchanging the authorization code for an access token.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.oauth2-client.callback.auto-register
properties.description: Whether to auto-register the client. When enabled, the client will be automatically registered with the authorization server using Dynamic Client Registration (DCR).

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.workload-identity
properties.description: Workload Identity capability configuration. Provides workload identity management and token issuance for applications and services.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.workload-identity.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Workload Identity capability is enabled.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.workload-identity.endpoints
properties.description: Endpoint configurations for Workload Identity. Defines the REST API endpoints for workload identity management.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.workload-identity.endpoints.create
properties.description: Create workload endpoint path. Creates a new workload identity with the specified attributes.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.workload-identity.endpoints.issue
properties.description: Issue workload endpoint path. Issues a workload token for an existing workload identity.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.workload-identity.endpoints.revoke
properties.description: Revoke workload endpoint path. Revokes a workload identity and invalidates all associated tokens.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.workload-identity.endpoints.get
properties.description: Get workload endpoint path. Retrieves information about a specific workload identity.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.workload-identity.endpoints.token-issue
properties.description: Issue workload token endpoint path. Issues a token for a workload identity without requiring the full workload identity to be created first.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit
properties.description: Audit capability configuration. Provides audit logging functionality for tracking security events, user actions, agent operations, and system activities.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.enabled
properties.description: Whether the Audit capability is enabled. When enabled, the application will record audit events for security monitoring, compliance tracking, and operational visibility.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.provider
properties.description: Audit provider implementation. Specifies the backend implementation for storing audit events. Supported providers include logging, database, elk.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints
properties.description: Endpoint configurations for Audit. Defines the REST API endpoints for audit event management, including querying events by various criteria.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.event-by-id
properties.description: Get audit event by ID endpoint path. Retrieves a specific audit event by its unique identifier.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-by-time-range
properties.description: Get audit events by time range endpoint path. Retrieves audit events within a specified time range.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-by-user
properties.description: Get audit events by user endpoint path. Retrieves audit events for a specific user.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-by-agent
properties.description: Get audit events by agent endpoint path. Retrieves audit events for a specific agent.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-by-session
properties.description: Get audit events by session endpoint path. Retrieves audit events for a specific session.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-by-type
properties.description: Get audit events by type endpoint path. Retrieves audit events by event type.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-by-severity
properties.description: Get audit events by severity endpoint path. Retrieves audit events by severity level.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-count
properties.description: Get audit events count endpoint path. Returns the total count of stored audit events.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-since
properties.description: Get audit events since timestamp endpoint path. Retrieves audit events that occurred after a specified timestamp.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-before
properties.description: Get audit events before timestamp endpoint path. Retrieves audit events that occurred before a specified timestamp.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.capabilities.audit.endpoints.events-recent
properties.description: Get recent audit events endpoint path. Retrieves the most recent audit events.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.security.session-cookie
properties.description: Session cookie configuration. Controls the security attributes and naming of the HTTP session cookie.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.security.session-cookie.name
properties.description: Custom name for the session cookie. When multiple services run on the same domain (e.g., localhost with different ports), they share the same cookie namespace. Using the default JSESSIONID for all services causes session cookie collisions. When not explicitly set, the framework automatically derives a unique cookie name from the first enabled role (e.g., 'authorization-server' becomes 'AUTHORIZATION_SERVER_SESSION'). Set this property to override the auto-derived name.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.security.session-cookie.http-only
properties.description: Whether the session cookie should be marked as HttpOnly. When true, the cookie is not accessible via JavaScript, mitigating XSS attacks.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.security.session-cookie.secure
properties.description: Whether the session cookie should be marked as Secure. When true, the cookie is only sent over HTTPS. Should be true in production.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.security.session-cookie.same-site
properties.description: The SameSite attribute for the session cookie. Valid values: Lax (default, recommended for OAuth flows), Strict (may cause session loss during OAuth redirects), None (requires secure=true, for cross-origin cookie access).

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures
properties.description: Infrastructure configuration properties for the Open Agent Auth framework. Defines the infrastructure-level configuration shared across all roles.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.trust-domain
properties.description: The trust domain for workload identity management. Defines the trust boundary for workload identities.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management
properties.description: Key management configuration. Defines how cryptographic keys are managed.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.providers
properties.description: Key providers configuration. A map of key provider configurations.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.providers.[provider-name]
properties.description: Configuration for a specific key provider.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.providers.[provider-name].type
properties.description: Provider type identifier. Specifies the type of key provider to use.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.providers.[provider-name].config
properties.description: Provider-specific configuration parameters. A map of configuration properties specific to the selected key provider type.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.keys
properties.description: Key definitions. A map of key definitions where the key is the logical key name.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.keys.[key-name]
properties.description: Configuration for a specific key definition.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.keys.[key-name].key-id
properties.description: Key identifier used in JWKS and JWT headers. This value is used as the kid header in JWT tokens.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.keys.[key-name].algorithm
properties.description: Cryptographic algorithm for signing and verification. Specifies the JWS algorithm to be used with this key.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.keys.[key-name].provider
properties.description: Key provider name. Specifies the provider that manages and stores the cryptographic key.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.key-management.keys.[key-name].jwks-consumer
properties.description: JWKS consumer name. Specifies the JWKS consumer that provides the public key for verification or encryption.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks
properties.description: JWKS (JSON Web Key Set) configuration. Controls how public keys are exposed and how external JWKS endpoints are consumed.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.provider
properties.description: Provider configuration (exposes public keys). When configured as a provider, this service will expose its public keys through a JWKS endpoint.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.provider.enabled
properties.description: Whether the JWKS provider is enabled. When enabled, the application will expose a JWKS endpoint.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.provider.path
properties.description: JWKS endpoint path. The HTTP path where the JWKS endpoint will be exposed.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.provider.cache-duration-seconds
properties.description: Cache duration in seconds. The duration for which clients should cache the JWKS response.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.provider.cache-headers-enabled
properties.description: Whether to include cache headers. When enabled, the HTTP response will include cache control headers.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.consumers
properties.description: Consumers configuration (for validating tokens from other IDPs). A map of consumer configurations for fetching and caching public keys.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.consumers.[consumer-name]
properties.description: Configuration for a specific JWKS consumer.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.consumers.[consumer-name].enabled
properties.description: Whether this JWKS consumer is enabled. When enabled, the application will configure a JWKS consumer that fetches and caches public keys.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.consumers.[consumer-name].jwks-endpoint
properties.description: JWKS endpoint URL. The URL of the JWKS endpoint from which public keys will be fetched.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.jwks.consumers.[consumer-name].issuer
properties.description: Issuer URL. The issuer identifier for the authorization server that issued the JWT tokens.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.service-discovery
properties.description: Service discovery configuration. Enables automatic discovery of other services within the trust domain.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.service-discovery.enabled
properties.description: Whether service discovery is enabled. When enabled, the application will use the configured service discovery mechanism.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.service-discovery.type
properties.description: Service discovery type. Specifies the service discovery mechanism to use (static, consul, eureka).

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.service-discovery.services
properties.description: Service definitions. A map of service definitions where the key is the service name.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.service-discovery.services.[service-name]
properties.description: Configuration for a specific service definition.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.service-discovery.services.[service-name].base-url
properties.description: Base URL of the service. The root URL for the service, which is used as the prefix for all endpoint paths.

properties.name: open-agent-auth.infrastructures.service-discovery.services.[service-name].endpoints
properties.description: Endpoint configurations. A map of endpoint name to relative path that defines all available endpoints.
